case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MIRABELLE MIRANDA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRANDA, MIRABELLE $5,802.93 PRINCIPAL, $355.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,157.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, MIRABELLE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-08-2013
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, MIRABELLE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED AUG-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, MIRABELLE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-29-2013 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-29-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $355.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, MIRABELLE

DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, MIRABELLE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-28-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
